summary: Iteration 13 testing complete. All NEW features tested: Admin Audit Log Viewer, Export CSV endpoints (trades/portfolio/margin), NIUM Customer Onboarding (simulated), Rate Limiting Middleware, NENO Exchange /market bugfix, Microservices Architecture Plan, I18n translations (IT/EN/DE/FR), WebSocket NENO orderbook status. 18/18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements and data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Audit Log requires ADMIN role (uppercase) - correctly implemented with 403 for non-admins
Rate limiting middleware adds X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Limit headers to all /api/* responses
NIUM onboarding falls back to simulated mode when API key/client_hash is invalid (expected behavior)
Export CSV endpoints return proper Content-Type: text/csv with Content-Disposition attachment headers
I18n translations complete for IT/EN/DE/FR with 100+ translation keys
Microservices architecture plan returns 7 domain groups with migration steps
WebSocket /api/ws/orderbook/neno endpoint exists for real-time NENO order book
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 features working: Admin Audit Log at /audit (admin only), Export CSV at /api/export/*, NIUM onboarding at /api/nium-onboarding/*, Rate limiting headers on all API calls, NENO /market endpoint fixed, Architecture plan at /api/monitoring/architecture, I18n with 4 languages (IT/EN/DE/FR), WebSocket orderbook at /api/ws/orderbook/neno. The admin user has ADMIN role (uppercase in MongoDB).

mocked_apis.nium_onboarding: NIUM customer onboarding falls back to simulated mode when API key/client_hash is invalid (expected in preview env)
